Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_Dummy0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_PERSON
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I already have {f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27}. {f 2 4 3} Personas will gain EXP.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_SWORD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Obtain {f 2 4 3} of the Skill Card[n]{f 0 1 40}{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_COIN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Obtain money.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your Attack will increase at the start of the next battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your Defense will increase at the start of the next battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your Accuracy/Evasion will increase at the start of the next battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All of your stats will increase at the start of the next battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The whole party's Attack will increase at the start of the next battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The whole party's Defense will increase at the start of the next battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The whole party's Accuracy/Evasion will increase at the start of the next battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your first physical attack in the next battle will do more than double damage.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your first magic attack in the next battle will do more than double damage.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your Theurgy gauge will completely fill.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You will deflect one physical attack in the next battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_12
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You will deflect one magic attack in the next battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_13
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your first attack will be more than doubled in the next battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_14
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You will deflect one physical or magic attack in the next battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_15
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The whole party's Theurgy gauges will completely fill.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_16
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Each ally's first attack will be more than doubled in the next battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_17
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You will recover 50% of your maximum HP.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_18
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your HP will be fully restored.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_19
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The whole party will recover 50% of their maximum HP.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CUP_20
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The whole party's HP will be fully restored.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_WAND
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}EXP acquired from this battle will increase.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_FOOL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}EXP acquired from battles will increase until you stop exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_PRIEST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All-Out Attack damage will increase until you stop exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_EMPRES
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The En, Ag, and Lu of Personas in your possession will increase by 2.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_EMPERO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The St and Ma of Personas in your possession will increase by 2.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_HIEROP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The level of your currently equipped Persona will increase by 1.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_LOVERS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Increases chances of encountering rare enemies until you stop exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_CHARIO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your {f 0 1 34}maximum HP{f 0 1 27} will increase by {f 0 1 45}10{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_JUSTIC
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You will be able to pick one additional card from Shuffle Time until you stop exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_HERMIT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your {f 0 1 34}maximum SP{f 0 1 27} will increase by {f 0 1 45}7{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_FORTUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All current party members' {f 0 1 34}maximum HP{f 0 1 27} will increase by {f 0 1 45}8{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_STRENG
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All current party members' {f 0 1 34}maximum SP{f 0 1 27} will increase by {f 0 1 45}5{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_HANGED
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Obtain one Incense Card, which increases a stat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_PERSON
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Acquired the Persona {f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_PERSON
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I already have {f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27} with me, so my {f 2 4 3} Personas have gained EXP![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_PERSON
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can't hold any more Personas. I need[n]to choose a Persona to release...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_SWORD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Obtained {f 2 4 3} of the Skill Card[n]{f 0 1 40}{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_COIN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Obtained {f 2 4 2} yen![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your Attack will increase at the start of the next battle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your Defense will increase at the start of the next battle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your Accuracy/Evasion will increase at the start of the next battle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All of your stats will increase at the start of the next battle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The whole party's Attack will increase at the start of the next battle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The whole party's Defense will increase at the start of the next battle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The whole party's Accuracy/Evasion will increase at the start of the next battle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your first physical attack in the next battle will do more than double damage![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your first magic attack in the next battle will do more than double damage![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your Theurgy gauge has been completely filled![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You will deflect one physical attack in the next battle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_12
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You will deflect one magic attack in the next battle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_13
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your first attack will be more than doubled in the next battle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_14
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You will deflect one physical or magic attack in the next battle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_15
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The whole party's Theurgy gauges have been completely filled![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_16
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Each ally's first attack will be more than doubled in the next battle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_17
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You recovered some HP![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_18
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your HP has been fully restored![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_19
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everyone recovered some HP![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CUP_20
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everyone's HP has been fully restored![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_WAND
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}More EXP has been acquired![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_FOOL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}More EXP will be acquired until you stop exploring![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_PRIEST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All-Out Attack damage will increase until you stop exploring![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_EMPRES
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Endurance, Agility, and Luck of Personas in your possession have increased by 2![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_EMPERO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Strength and Magic of Personas in your possession have increased by 2![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_HIEROP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The level of your currently equipped Persona has increased by 1![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_LOVERS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The chance of encountering rare enemies has increased until you stop exploring![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_CHARIO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your {f 0 1 34}maximum HP{f 0 1 27} has increased by {f 0 1 45}10{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_JUSTIC
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The number of cards you can pick during Shuffle Time has increased by 1 until you stop exploring![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_HERMIT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your {f 0 1 34}maximum SP{f 0 1 27} has increased by {f 0 1 45}7{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_FORTUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All current party members' {f 0 1 34}maximum HP{f 0 1 27} have increased by {f 0 1 45}8{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_STRENG
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All current party members' {f 0 1 34}maximum SP{f 0 1 27} have increased by {f 0 1 45}5{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_GET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Obtained the {f 2 4 0} Arcana card, rank {f 2 4 1}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_Get_NoRank
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Obtained the {f 2 4 0} Arcana card![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYSShuffle_PERSONA_REMOV
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you sure you want to release {f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 4}{f 0 1 27}?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYSShuffle_PERSONA_REMOV
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you sure you want to give up acquiring {f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27}?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_ALLGET_BEFORE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Something is about to change...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_ALLGET_AFTER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A change has occurred with the Arcana![n]BONUS BONANZA![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_Tutorial_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tutorial - Major Arcana Cards[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_Tutorial_1_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The powerful Major Arcana cards can appear during Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_Tutorial_1_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}More Major Arcana cards can appear for each time you successfully overcome an ordeal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_Tutorial_1_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you acquire all the Major Arcana cards, certain changes will occur with the other cards.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_Tutorial_2_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tutorial - Persona Cards Already in Possession[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_Tutorial_2_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you choose a Persona that you already have, then all Personas who share the same Arcana will gain experience.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_ALLGET_COUTDO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Number of cards needed until BONUS BONANZA: {f 2 4 4}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_TEMPER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}How fast the Theurgy gauge fills will increase until you stop exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_DEVIL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Obtain more items from enemies and objects until you stop exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_TOWER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All of your current Personas will have their stats increased by 1.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_STAR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You will be able to pick 1 additional card during Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_MOON
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All current party members will have their HP and SP fully restored.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_SUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Personas up to 5 levels above yours can be fused until you stop exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: ShuffleMsg_DETAIL_JUDGEM
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The party member with the lowest level will gain a large amount of EXP.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_TEMPER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}How fast the Theurgy gauge fills will increase until you stop exploring![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_DEVIL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The number of items obtained by defeating enemies and destroying breakable objects will increase until you stop exploring![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_TOWER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The stats of all of your Personas currently in possession have increased by 1![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_STAR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The number of cards you can pick during Shuffle Time has increased by 1 until you stop exploring![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_MOON
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The HP and SP of all current party members have been fully restored![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_SUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fusion of Personas up to 5 levels above your current level is now possible until you stop exploring![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MNDShuffle_EFFECT_JUDGEM
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 2 4 2} has gained EXP![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Skill Cards[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYSShuffle_PERSONA_EQUIP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You cannot release a Persona that's currently equipped.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Acquired the Persona {f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}
